extraction.one_line_summary: BERNAL Egan attacked inside 3km on Gotthardpass summit finish, gained 23 seconds on Denis before final day time trial.
tactical_patterns: Team Ineos delayed tempo increase until final 3km rather than prolonged grinding, preserving Bernal's explosive attack freshness.
Bernal prioritized gaining time before final TT against specialist Denis, attacking knowing he'd lose time next day.
Bahrain's Pozzo-Vivo attempted bridge then dropped back as domestique for Denis, dual-role tactic to cover both scenarios.

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: attacked with 3km remaining on summit finish against world TT champion, acknowledging TT weakness but maximizing climbing advantage
rider_signals.POZZO Domenico: neutral: showed enough form to briefly follow Bernal before switching to pacing role for Denis
rider_signals.DENNIS Roeland: negative: needed domestique pacing to limit losses to 23 seconds on climb, suggesting vulnerable GC defense before his specialist TT stage
rider_signals.FRANK Mathias: positive: local rider survived solo until 3km on home roads, indicating strong climbing form against GC squad pressure
